zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Foliot於大約1282年出生在英國諾福爾可格雷哈爾時，她的父親Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot34歲，母親Margery de Newmarch46歲。她於1300年與Sir Alphonse de Vere在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1324年6月23日之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷哈爾，埋葬在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Foliot于大约1282年出生在英国諾福爾可格雷哈爾时，她的父亲Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot34岁，母亲Margery de Newmarch46岁。她于1300年与Sir Alphonse de Vere在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1324年6月23日之前在英国英格兰諾福爾可格雷哈爾，埋葬在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Foliot was born about 1282, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, her father, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, was 34 and her mother, Margery de Newmarch, was 46. She married Sir Alphonse de Vere in 1300, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 23 June 1324, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Foliot est née environ 1282, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margery de Newmarch, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alphonse de Vere en 1300, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 23 juin 1324, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Foliot um 1282 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot 34 und ihre Mutter Margery de Newmarch 46. Sie hat 1300 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Alphonse de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 23. Juni 1324 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Foliot è nata il circa 1282 nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margery de Newmarch, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alphonse de Vere nel 1300, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 23 giugno 1324, nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Foliotが約1282年にイギリスノーフォルクグレセンハルで生まれた時，父Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliotは34歳，母Margery de Newmarchは46歳であった。1300年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでSir Alphonse de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1324年6月23日以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレセンハルで死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Foliot(이)가 대략 1282년 영국 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Newmarch(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Sir Alphonse de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 6월 23일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Foliot nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Newmarch, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alphonse de Vere em 1300, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 23 de junho de 1324, em Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Foliot родилась около 1282 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Newmarch, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alphonse de Vere в 1300 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 23 июнь 1324 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия.

sm.about 1282–BEF 23 JUN 1324: e tusa o le 1282–a'e le'I oo le 23 Iuni 1324

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Foliot nació aproximadamente 1282, en Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margery de Newmarch, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sir Alphonse de Vere en 1300, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 23 de junio de 1324, en Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
